reviews.comment:
La atención Excelente!. Pero las instalaciones son un poco antiguas, desde el surtidor, hasta la tienda tipo Full,  que en realidad no es Full, seria como un kiosco dentro de la estación.

(Translated by Google)
The service was excellent! However, the facilities are a bit outdated, from the gas pump to the convenience store, which isn't really a full-service store; it's more like a kiosk inside the station.
